name: miniBONG
short_description: "miniBONG" is a lightweight rogue-like game that focuses on dress-up DIY and idle gameplay, while incorporating elements of combat, character development, and strategy.. You can feel the charm of dressing up and fighting at the same time.
detailed_description:
"miniBONG" is a lightweight rogue-like game that focuses on dress-up DIY and idle gameplay, while incorporating elements of combat, character development, and strategy.. You can feel the charm of dressing up and fighting at the same time.

Features:
· Street sense trendy dressing style
· Automated lazy play
· Role development
· Multiple levels of difficulty, multiple dress-ups

Contact Information: ginibong2023@163.com
Discord: https://discord.gg/meHWcyBxZF
